author: Besting
text: AFFECTED by config/store split: `make install` must SHIP the app-level default-config/ seed folder to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/balls/default-config/ (prime copies it into a fresh landing — bl-4e14). Add it as a component target alongside the binaries. bl-2e26 §1/§12.

author: Absolutism
text:
Done. Makefile restructured: install-core (bl + balls symlink), install-tracker, install-delivery, and bare 'make install' = all three; uninstall removes all four artifacts. Verified each target installs the right binaries to a temp PREFIX and uninstall cleans up.

Two scope deviations from the original description, both because the design moved after this ball was filed:
- NO install-gate: the gate plugin was RETIRED (bl-295e, closed) — core now enforces blockers; there is no gate binary to install (src/bin holds only tracker.rs + bl-delivery.rs).
- NO default-config component target: bl-4e14's own note supersedes the note here — the default-config seed is now EMBEDDED in the bl binary (include_dir!/include_str!), written out on first prime; the XDG default-config/ folder is an OPTIONAL org override, not something make install ships. There is also no default-config/ folder in the tree to ship, and bl-4e14 is still dep-blocked/unbuilt.
- Also dropped the stale 'bl completions --install/--uninstall' lines: the greenfield bl has no completions verb (verbs: create/claim/unclaim/update/close/drop/show/list/ready/dep-tree/doctor/prime/sync/install), so the old line broke 'make install' with exit 2.

author: Absolutism
text: make install: per-component targets + full-suite default
